numerical_claims.computed_value: 66 files in lean/SKEFTHawking/ (65 physics + ExtractDeps infrastructure)
numerical_claims.notes: Count matches if ExtractDeps.lean is included. Minor: ExtractDeps is tooling not physics.

QNumber.lean has 11 theorems (qInt_zero, qInt_one, qInt_two, qInt_three, evalAtOne_T, qInt_classical_limit, qInt_two_pow4_classical, qInt_three_classical, qFactorial_zero, qFactorial_one, qnumber_summary). Paper claims 13. If counting defs (qInt, evalAtOne, qFactorial) brings total declarations to 14, but those are defs not theorems.

Uqsl2.lean has 6 theorems (uq_K_mul_Kinv, uq_Kinv_mul_K, uq_KE, uq_KF, uq_serre, uqsl2_summary). Even counting all declarations (inductive, abbrev, def, theorem) gives ~14, but those are not theorems. Paper must use 'thms' to mean only theorems.
No combination of Drinfeld* files sums to 47. Three core DrinfeldDouble files = 27. All five Drinfeld* files = 57. Paper value matches neither.

theorem_refs.name: qInt (QNumber.lean)
theorem_refs.notes: qInt is a def, not theorem. Present in QNumber.lean.

theorem_refs.name: Uqsl2 (Uqsl2.lean)
theorem_refs.notes: Uqsl2 is an abbrev (= RingQuot (ChevalleyRel k)). Present, no sorry.

theorem_refs.name: ChevalleyRel (Uqsl2.lean)
theorem_refs.notes: Inductive proposition, well-formed, 5 constructors matching 5 relations.

theorem_refs.name: uq_KE
theorem_refs.notes: KE = q^2 EK, fully proved. Paper line 142 falsely says 'pending Aristotle'.

theorem_refs.name: uq_KF
theorem_refs.notes: KF = q^-2 FK, fully proved. Paper line 142 falsely says 'pending Aristotle'.

theorem_refs.name: uq_serre
theorem_refs.notes: Serre relation fully proved. Paper line 142 falsely says 'pending Aristotle'.

parameter_provenance.notes: Paper 11 has no entry in PAPER_DEPENDENCIES (provenance.py). This is a pure algebra paper with no experimental parameters, so no parameter provenance is needed. But the PAPER_DEPENDENCIES registry should be updated to include paper 11.

citation_integrity.notes: Not in CITATION_REGISTRY. Also: bibkey says 2001 but entry is arXiv:math/0307016 (2003).
Not in CITATION_REGISTRY. Bibkey says 2005 but entry cites NPB 873 (2013) and arXiv:0906.1215 (2009).
Companion paper cross-reference. Not a published citation.
Companion paper cross-reference. Not a published citation.

qualitative_claims.claim: First quantum group definition in any proof assistant (abstract, line 49, line 180)
qualitative_claims.support: No competing formalization found in Mathlib, Coq MathComp, or Isabelle AFP. Claim is plausible but unverifiable from codebase alone.
qualitative_claims.notes: Priority claim. Should cite a search (e.g., Mathlib docs, Coq opam, Isabelle AFP) to substantiate 'first'.

qualitative_claims.claim: KE, KF, and Serre proofs require additional algebraMap plumbing (pending Aristotle) (line 141-142)
qualitative_claims.support: FALSE. All five Chevalley relation theorems (uq_KE, uq_KF, uq_serre) are FULLY PROVED in Uqsl2.lean with no sorry.
qualitative_claims.notes: Paper text is STALE. The proofs were completed but the paper was not updated. Must remove 'pending Aristotle' language.

qualitative_claims.claim: zero sorry (pending Aristotle filling 11 relation proofs) (line 188-189)
qualitative_claims.support: Self-contradictory. lake build is clean (zero sorry confirmed). No sorry exists anywhere in QNumber.lean or Uqsl2.lean. The parenthetical '(pending Aristotle filling 11 relation proofs)' is false and contradicts 'zero sorry'.
qualitative_claims.notes: CRITICAL. The paper simultaneously claims zero sorry AND pending Aristotle work. Remove the parenthetical entirely or rewrite to reflect that ALL proofs are complete.

qualitative_claims.claim: 87 theorems for Drinfeld center (intro paragraph, line 64)
qualitative_claims.support: Paper says '87 theorems' for the center equivalence. The five Drinfeld* files total 57 theorems. Additional center-related modules (CenterEquivalenceZ2: 10, VecG: 9, VecGMonoidal: 12, S3CenterAnyons: 22, ToricCodeCenter: 25) would add more, but the exact scope of '87' is unclear.
qualitative_claims.notes: Cannot verify the '87 theorems' claim without knowing which modules are included. May be correct for a different set of modules than those checked.

qualitative_claims.claim: Hopf algebra hierarchy recently merged in Mathlib (line 57, 195)
qualitative_claims.support: Mathlib pinned to commit 8f9d9cff. Cannot verify merge status from codebase.
qualitative_claims.notes: Verify that Coalgebra -> Bialgebra -> HopfAlgebra is present in the pinned Mathlib commit.

axiom_risk.reason: QNumber.lean and Uqsl2.lean contain zero axiom declarations. Paper's 'zero axioms' claim for these modules is verified.

hypothesis_risk.hypothesis: k is a commutative ring (universe polymorphic)
hypothesis_risk.nature: Standard algebraic assumption. The construction works over any commutative ring, which is maximally general.

figure_review.notes: No Wave 7 / quantum group / q-number figures found in figures/ directory. Paper 11 is a pure algebra paper with no computational figures. The table in Section 4 is text-based, not a generated figure.
